_meta.source: Public directories (jamshedpur.nic.in, hospital official websites, Justdial, Practo, Mappls, Sulekha). Coordinates are neighborhood-accurate; verify precise lat/lng with Google Maps before demo day.

hospitals.name: Tata Main Hospital (TMH)
hospitals.address: C Road West, Northern Town, Bistupur, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831001
hospitals.notes: Largest multispeciality hospital in Jamshedpur. Run by Tata Steel. Primary trauma referral center. Affiliated with Manipal-Tata Medical College.

hospitals.name: Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Medical College & Hospital
hospitals.notes: Government teaching hospital under the Government of Jharkhand. Largest govt hospital in the region. Free treatment for BPL patients.

hospitals.name: Brahmananda Narayana Multispeciality Hospital
hospitals.address: NH-33, Near Pardih Chowk, Tamolia, Saraikela Kharsawan, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831012
hospitals.notes: Narayana Health network hospital. Strong in cardiac care. Located on the highway - good for accident trauma.

hospitals.name: Medica Kantilal Gandhi Memorial Hospital
hospitals.address: South Park, Outer Circle Road, Near Adityapur Bridge, Bistupur, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831001
hospitals.notes: Part of Medica Synergy network. Strategic location near Adityapur bridge - frequent accident site.

hospitals.name: Meherbai Tata Memorial Hospital
hospitals.address: Stocking Road, Northern Town, Bistupur, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831001
hospitals.notes: Dedicated cancer care centre within TMH campus. First PET-CT scanner in Jharkhand. Free OPD for BPL patients. Not a primary trauma center but has ICU capacity.

hospitals.name: Tinplate Hospital
hospitals.address: Near Tinplate Works, Golmuri, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831003
hospitals.notes: Operated by Tata Tinplate Company. Well-equipped for industrial and general emergencies in the Golmuri belt.

hospitals.name: Tata Motors Main Hospital (Telco Hospital)
hospitals.notes: Operated by Tata Motors for employees and public. Strong emergency response for the Telco/Jugsalai area.

hospitals.name: Mercy Hospital
hospitals.address: Medical Corridor, Tube Colony, Tin Plate Basti, Baridih, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831017
hospitals.notes: Community hospital with 24x7 emergency services. Well-known in the Baridih belt.

hospitals.name: Uma Super Speciality Hospital
hospitals.address: Shalimar Complex, New Purulia Road, Near Chepapul Corner, Mango, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831012
hospitals.notes: Cashless network hospital for major insurers. Covers the Mango / Purulia Road belt.

hospitals.name: Sadar Hospital (District Hospital)
hospitals.address: Sadar Hospital Campus, Khasmahal, Jugsalai, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831002
hospitals.notes: Government district hospital for East Singhbhum. Free treatment. Connected to 108 ambulance network.

hospitals.name: Steel City Clinic & Research Centre
hospitals.address: 201, 2nd Floor, YashKamal Complex, Tata-Hata Main Road, Bistupur, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831001
hospitals.notes: Small research and clinic centre. Daytime only. Useful for non-critical cases in central Bistupur.

hospitals.name: The Apollo Clinic
hospitals.address: 19, Ram Mandir Area, Opposite Punjab National Bank, Bistupur, Jamshedpur, Jharkhand 831001
hospitals.notes: Apollo-branded outpatient clinic. Part of Apollo network. Limited emergency capability but useful as a stabilization point.
